name: Women's Comfort Knit Runner
description: Breathable knit upper with responsive foam cushioning for all-day comfort. Perfect for running or casual wear.

name: Classic Platform Sneakers
description: Elevate your look with a chunky platform sole and premium synthetic leather finish. A versatile staple.

name: Active Trail Hiking Shoes
description: Rugged outsole for maximum grip and a water-resistant upper for facing the elements in style.

name: Sleek Slip-on Loafers
description: Effortless slip-on design with a polished faux-leather exterior. Perfect for office environments.

name: Aura Canvas High-Tops
description: Iconic high-top silhouette in durable canvas. Features a cushioned footbed for street-ready comfort.

name: Flex Yoga Slip-ons
description: Ultra-lightweight and flexible design allowing natural foot movement. Easy to slip on post-workout.
